summary: Verified bug fixes for GET /api/users/{user_id} endpoint (was returning 405 Method Not Allowed) and ErrorBoundary component. All backend endpoints return 200 with correct data. Frontend login, tab navigation, My Account page, and contact detail page all work correctly without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/users/{user_id} endpoint (lines 318-331 in server.py) correctly returns user profile data with _id converted to string and password removed
PATCH /api/users/{user_id} endpoint still works correctly after adding GET endpoint
ErrorBoundary component properly wraps entire app in _layout.tsx (lines 111-136)
ErrorBoundary has proper error recovery UI with 'Try Again' button
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user and contacts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) GET /api/users/{user_id} now returns 200 with user data (was 405 before), (2) ErrorBoundary component wraps entire app to prevent crashes. All main navigation tabs work (Home, Contacts, Activity, Inbox, Hub). My Account page loads correctly showing user profile. Contact detail page loads correctly.

backend.GET /api/users/{user_id}: PASS - returns 200 with user profile data (was 405 before fix)
backend.PATCH /api/users/{user_id}: PASS - still works after adding GET endpoint
backend.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - returns token and user data

frontend.Login flow: PASS - navigates to /home after successful login
frontend.My Account page: PASS - /my-account loads with user profile (Forest, Super Admin badge, My Presence sections)
frontend.Contact detail page: PASS - /contact/{id} loads with contact info, actions, feed, and message input
frontend.ErrorBoundary component: PASS - exists in /app/frontend/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx and wraps app in _layout.tsx

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: GET /api/users/{user_id} endpoint was missing - only PATCH existed at that path, causing 405 Method Not Allowed when my-account.tsx called api.get(/users/${user._id}) on page focus
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added GET /api/users/{user_id} endpoint at lines 318-331 in server.py that returns user profile data with _id converted to string and password removed
rca_of_the_issue.additional_fix: Added ErrorBoundary component to wrap entire app in _layout.tsx to prevent future uncaught React errors from crashing the app
